plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them in chats.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos for chats.

plugins.contactsPermission: The app accesses your contacts to invite friends.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: The app accesses your location to share with friends.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: The app accesses your location to share with friends.
